title: McHacks XIII '26
summary: QUARCC won three categories at McHacks 13: National Bank HFT, Best Use of Solana, and Best use of Athena AI
detail:
QUARCC competeted in three challenges, bringing home all of them. 

 National Bank Market Making HFT Challenge: Carter Cameron, Sam Beaudoin 

 Best Use of Solana: Nicolas Romero 

 Best Use of Athena AI: Thomas Ballard
